HomePage.description: Integrating science, knowledge, and dialogue for sustainable Amazonian development.

Metadata.title: CONIAP | International Congress on the Peruvian Amazon
Metadata.description: III International Congress on the Peruvian Amazon carried out by the Research Institute of the Peruvian Amazon (IIAP).

about.title: About Us
about.description: The International Congress on the Peruvian Amazon (CONIAP) is a scientific event organized by the Research Institute of the Peruvian Amazon (IIAP). It brings together researchers, academics, students, and professionals from around the world to share their knowledge and experiences on the Amazon.

editions.title: Editions
editions.description: Explore the previous editions of the International Congress on the Peruvian Amazon.
